sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ إِيمَانُ مُحَاسِبَةً فِي شَرِكَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Iman radi kao računovođa u maloj kompaniji.
sentences.translationEn: Iman works as an accountant in a small company.

sentences.arabic: تُرَاجِعُ الْأَرْقَامَ وَتُسَجِّلُ الْمَصَارِيفَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan pregledava brojke i evidentira troškove.
sentences.translationEn: She reviews the numbers and records the expenses every day.

sentences.translation: Koristi računar i posebne programe za brojeve.
sentences.translationEn: She uses the computer and special programmes for numbers.

sentences.arabic: تَشْعُرُ بِالرِّضَا حِينَ تَتَطَابَقُ الْأَرْقَامُ فِي النِّهَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Osjeća zadovoljstvo kad se na kraju brojevi poklope.
sentences.translationEn: She feels satisfied when the numbers match up at the end.
